title: readmemh transform to VL_READMEM_N ,set depth and array_lsb
body: when I use $readmemh(file, mem)，in the file, here has address of 0x20000000, but the transformed function VL_READMEM_N parameter depth is solid as 1048576（0x100000）and array_lsb is 0, which will cause error about out of bound of array, how can i modify the depth and array_lsb
